proposal.subject: Re: Partnership opportunity
proposal.body: Hi Rachel, your proposal sounds interesting. Yes, we can offer a 30-day pilot for your team of 20. Let me know if you'd like a kickoff call next week.
proposal.in_reply_to_summary: Rachel introduced herself as head of ops at a company we have not corresponded with before and proposed a pilot.
proposal.actor_justification: Inbound looks legitimate and the pilot terms are within our standard policy.
